approved_copy: Most Web3 phones begin with a wallet or token narrative. MAGNE.AI is taking a hardware-first route. MAGNE Phone Gen1 brings hardware-backed key protection, private on-device AI workflows, MAGNE L1, MHash L2 and native Web3 access into one physical device. The point is not to add another crypto app to Android — it is to design the phone itself as a secure gateway for ownership, intelligence and onchain interaction. The official create-wallet demo shows the device workflow rather than only a render. I’m watching how MAGNE connects these layers as it moves toward delivery. Create-wallet demo: https://youtube.com/shorts/ZMhyf6yImOc Media Kit: https://www.magne.ai/magne-web/media-kit.html

MAGNE Phone Gen1 brings hardware-backed key protection, private on-device AI workflows, MAGNE L1, MHash L2 and native Web3 access into one physical device. The point is not to add another crypto app to Android — it is to design the phone itself as a secure gateway for ownership, intelligence and onchain interaction. The official create-wallet demo shows the device workflow rather than only a render. I’m watching how MAGNE connects these layers as it moves toward delivery. Create-wallet demo: https://youtube.com/shorts/ZMhyf6yImOc Media Kit: https://www.magne.ai/magne-web/media-kit.html
reference_copy_zh: 多数Web3手机从钱包或Token叙事开始，MAGNE.AI选择了一条以硬件为先的路径。 MAGNE Phone Gen1把硬件级密钥保护、端侧私有AI、MAGNE L1、MHash L2和原生Web3入口整合进一台真实设备。重点不是在Android上再安装一个加密应用，而是把手机本身设计为连接数字所有权、智能能力和链上交互的安全入口。 产品、安全架构和网络体系已经可以公开查看。我正在关注MAGNE如何把这些层连接起来并推进交付。 https://www.magne.ai/

primary_angle: CC EAL6+ secure element and hardware wallet
approved_copy: Security on a Web3 phone should begin below the app layer. MAGNE.AI uses a three-layer architecture: a CC EAL2+ trusted execution environment, a CC EAL6+ secure element for key storage and signing, and encrypted NFC recovery. That separation matters because critical signing flows should not depend only on the normal Android environment. This does not mean “zero risk,” but it is materially different from a software-only wallet. NFC restore: https://youtube.com/shorts/bcHC_FbMrog Mnemonic restore: https://youtube.com/shorts/naYHLTVEeWw Media Kit: https://www.magne.ai/magne-web/media-kit.html
reference_copy_en: Security on a Web3 phone should begin below the app layer. MAGNE.AI uses a three-layer architecture: a CC EAL2+ trusted execution environment, a CC EAL6+ secure element for key storage and signing, and encrypted NFC recovery. That separation matters because critical signing flows should not depend only on the normal Android environment. This does not mean “zero risk,” but it is materially different from a software-only wallet. NFC restore: https://youtube.com/shorts/bcHC_FbMrog Mnemonic restore: https://youtube.com/shorts/naYHLTVEeWw Media Kit: https://www.magne.ai/magne-web/media-kit.html
reference_copy_zh: Web3手机的安全不应只从应用层开始。MAGNE.AI采用三层架构：CC EAL2+可信执行环境、用于私钥存储和签名的CC EAL6+安全元件，以及NFC加密恢复。 这种隔离很重要，因为关键签名流程不应完全依赖普通Android环境。MAGNE正在把硬件级保护直接嵌入设备使用流程。 这不代表“零风险”，但它与在普通手机上安装软件钱包是明显不同的安全模式。 https://www.magne.ai/security-lookup.html

primary_angle: One-tap Gemini access and hybrid AI experience
approved_copy: MAGNE Phone Gen1 uses a practical hybrid-AI architecture rather than claiming that every AI workload runs locally. Its current on-device capability focuses on real-time call translation. For more complex assistant, reasoning and multimodal tasks, users can reach Gemini through a dedicated one-tap entry. This separation is clear: local AI handles a focused privacy-sensitive function, while Gemini provides broader cloud intelligence when needed. Gemini demo: https://youtube.com/shorts/u61eNffrhe0 Features Demo: https://www.magne.ai/magne-web/features-demo.html
reference_copy_en: MAGNE Phone Gen1 uses a practical hybrid-AI architecture rather than claiming that every AI workload runs locally. Its current on-device capability focuses on real-time call translation. For more complex assistant, reasoning and multimodal tasks, users can reach Gemini through a dedicated one-tap entry. This separation is clear: local AI handles a focused privacy-sensitive function, while Gemini provides broader cloud intelligence when needed. Gemini demo: https://youtube.com/shorts/u61eNffrhe0 Features Demo: https://www.magne.ai/magne-web/features-demo.html
reference_copy_zh: MAGNE Phone Gen1采用务实的双AI架构，而不是声称所有AI任务都能在手机本地运行。 目前端侧AI能力聚焦于通话实时语音翻译，语音识别、语言处理和翻译流程尽量靠近设备执行，以降低延迟并加强隐私保护。对于更复杂的助手、推理和多模态任务，用户可以通过专属入口一键直达Gemini。 这一边界非常清晰：本地AI负责聚焦且涉及隐私的通话翻译，Gemini则在需要时提供更广泛的云端智能。 https://www.magne.ai/magne-web/magne-ai.html

approved_copy: MAGNE.AI is not positioning the phone as a device with only a pre-installed wallet. It is building a device-to-chain stack. MAGNE L1 is designed around ownership, device identity and secure authorization. MHash L2, built with the OP Stack, supports scalable execution, service calls, payments and settlement. The phone becomes the user-facing gateway connecting both layers. Both networks are currently testnets, and their activity can be checked through public explorers. https://web3.magne.ai/network.html
reference_copy_en: MAGNE.AI is not positioning the phone as a device with only a pre-installed wallet. It is building a device-to-chain stack. MAGNE L1 is designed around ownership, device identity and secure authorization. MHash L2, built with the OP Stack, supports scalable execution, service calls, payments and settlement. The phone becomes the user-facing gateway connecting both layers. Both networks are currently testnets, and their activity can be checked through public explorers. https://web3.magne.ai/network.html
reference_copy_zh: MAGNE.AI并不是把手机定位成“预装钱包的设备”，而是在建设一套从设备到链的基础设施。 MAGNE L1面向所有权、设备身份和安全授权；基于OP Stack的MHash L2支持扩展执行、服务调用、支付与结算。手机则成为连接两层网络的用户入口。 两条网络目前均为测试网，可通过公开浏览器验证。 https://web3.magne.ai/network.html

primary_angle: MAGNE Agent Pay and x402 payments
approved_copy: AI agents need more than intelligence — they need a verifiable way to request services, authorize payments and record outcomes. MAGNE Agent Pay is exploring that workflow through x402: an agent can encounter a payment requirement, obtain authorization, complete a service payment and produce an onchain task receipt. MAGNE L1 supports device identity and authorization, while MHash L2 supports service calls and settlement. This is still an early demo, not a claim of full commercial deployment, but it shows how MAGNE connects AI agents with onchain payments. https://jerrysohigh-create.github.io/magne-web3/tc/agent-pay.html
reference_copy_en: AI agents need more than intelligence — they need a verifiable way to request services, authorize payments and record outcomes. MAGNE Agent Pay is exploring that workflow through x402: an agent can encounter a payment requirement, obtain authorization, complete a service payment and produce an onchain task receipt. MAGNE L1 supports device identity and authorization, while MHash L2 supports service calls and settlement. This is still an early demo, not a claim of full commercial deployment, but it shows how MAGNE connects AI agents with onchain payments. https://jerrysohigh-create.github.io/magne-web3/tc/agent-pay.html
reference_copy_zh: AI Agent不仅需要智能，还需要一种可验证的服务请求、支付授权和结果记录方式。 MAGNE Agent Pay正在通过x402探索这一流程：Agent遇到支付要求后获得授权，完成服务支付，并生成链上任务收据。MAGNE L1支持设备身份与授权，MHash L2支持服务调用和结算。 目前这是早期演示，并非全面商业部署，但它展示了MAGNE连接AI Agent与链上支付的方向。 https://jerrysohigh-create.github.io/magne-web3/tc/agent-pay.html

approved_copy: Hardware credibility is built through verifiable milestones, not adjectives. MAGNE Phone Gen1 has Google GMS approval, GSMA TAC, public FCC records, completed CB work, passed UN38.3 and CP65 requirements, Widevine L1 support, and CE approval. Each item addresses a different part of platform compatibility, network identity, safety or market readiness. Together, they show a device program progressing through real compliance work rather than relying only on a roadmap. https://www.magne.ai/magne-web/magne-compliance.html
reference_copy_en: Hardware credibility is built through verifiable milestones, not adjectives. MAGNE Phone Gen1 has Google GMS approval, GSMA TAC, public FCC records, completed CB work, passed UN38.3 and CP65 requirements, Widevine L1 support, and CE approval. Each item addresses a different part of platform compatibility, network identity, safety or market readiness. Together, they show a device program progressing through real compliance work rather than relying only on a roadmap. https://www.magne.ai/magne-web/magne-compliance.html
reference_copy_zh: 硬件可信度来自可验证里程碑，而不是形容词。 MAGNE Phone Gen1已经获得Google GMS、GSMA TAC和CE已通过；FCC已有公开记录；CB已完成；UN38.3和CP65已通过，并支持Widevine L1。 这些项目分别对应平台兼容、网络身份、安全和市场准备。它们共同说明MAGNE正在推进真实设备的合规工作，而不只是发布路线图。 https://www.magne.ai/magne-web/magne-compliance.html

primary_angle: Agent Pay contract and AI Task Receipt
approved_copy: MAGNE Agent Pay is designed to make AI service execution verifiable from request to settlement. In the demo workflow, an AI task triggers an x402 payment requirement, receives authorization, completes payment and records a Task Receipt onchain. This receipt can provide a checkable record of the service call and settlement path. The key evidence is the real transaction, not just the interface. Review the demo and verify the linked Task Receipt before publication. Demo: https://jerrysohigh-create.github.io/magne-web3/tc/agent-pay.html Task Receipt: [INSERT VERIFIED TX URL]

primary_angle: US$12.64M total publicly disclosed strategic funding
approved_copy: MAGNE.AI has expanded its publicly disclosed strategic funding to US$12.64 million. The total combines the previously announced US$10 million strategic round with an additional US$2.64 million involving GAEA Ventures and Titans Ventures. The new capital is intended to accelerate engineering validation and commercial delivery of MAGNE AI BOX, while advancing integration with MAGNE L1 and MHash L2. primary_angle: Session 1 completed 1,004 phones and Session 2 progress
approved_copy: MAGNE.AI’s first Phone Gen1 campaign stage completed 1,004 phone allocations. Session 2 is now continuing with live progress and public campaign information. approved_copy: Transparency is more useful when users can inspect the same records themselves. MAGNE.AI’s campaign combines a public dashboard with onchain contracts and transaction records. X and Binance Live metrics will be reported separately. Official campaign access: https://payment.magne.ai/

approved_copy: How to review the MAGNE.AI Phone Gen1 campaign before participating: 1. Open the official payment.magne.ai page. 2. Read eligibility, regional restrictions and campaign rules. 3. approved_copy:
如果只把 MAGNE.AI 看成一個代幣項目，可能會錯過真正值得關注的部分。

MAGNE.AI 正在把 Phone Gen1、CC EAL6+ 安全元件、端側即時通話翻譯、MAGNE L1＋MHash L2，以及早期 Agent Pay 工作流程整合進同一個產品生態。

目前可公開查驗的進展包括 Google GMS 已通過、GSMA TAC 已取得、FCC 已公示，以及 CE 已通過。Phone Gen1 Session 1 共收到 1,264 筆有效參與條目，Session 2 現正開放。

參與前請先查看官方活動規則、資格及地區限制。

官網：https://www.magne.ai/

活動入口：https://payment.magne.ai/
reference_copy_en:
If MAGNE.AI is viewed only as a token project, the part most worth paying attention to may be missed.

MAGNE.AI is bringing Phone Gen1, the CC EAL6+ secure element, on-device real-time call translation, MAGNE L1 + MHash L2, and an early Agent Pay workflow together in one product ecosystem.

Publicly verifiable progress currently includes Google GMS Approved, GSMA TAC Obtained, FCC Public, and CE Approved. Phone Gen1 Session 1 received 1,264 valid entries, and Session 2 is now open.

Before participating, review the official campaign rules, eligibility requirements, and regional restrictions.

Website: https://www.magne.ai/

Campaign entry: https://payment.magne.ai/
